title: Suppression Entry Context Schema
description: JSON Schema for the `context` payload of a Riverbed Memory entry whose `type` is `suppression`. The parent entry is validated by riverbed-entry.schema.json (which permits additional context properties); this schema constrains the suppression-specific shape so that auto-suppression and feedback typing remain consistent. See Issue #687 (Epic #650).

feedbackType.description: Why this suppression was added. Used by applySuppressions to decide whether auto-suppression is allowed for the finding's severity.

scope.description: Spatial scope at which the suppression should match future findings.

severity.description: Severity of the finding being suppressed at the time of suppression.

fingerprintAlgo.description: Version tag for the fingerprint algorithm. Allows future migration without breaking older entries.

active.description: Whether the suppression is currently in effect. Revocations are recorded as separate `resurface` entries; this flag must remain true for the suppression to be considered active by findActiveSuppressions.

fingerprint.description: 16-hex sha256-derived fingerprint produced by computeFingerprint(finding) in src/lib/finding-fingerprint.mjs. Required for auto-suppression matching introduced in #687 PR-B.

minSeverityToAutoSuppress.description: Optional override. When set, only findings whose severity is at or below this rank may be auto-suppressed by this entry. Default policy (#687 PR-B): findings of severity major/critical require feedbackType=accepted_risk.

duplicateOfFingerprint.description: Set when feedbackType=duplicate. Points at the canonical fingerprint that this finding duplicates.

findingId.description: Original transient finding ID at the time of suppression (regenerated each run; do not rely on for matching).

findingHash.description: Legacy hash from src/lib/suppression.mjs:hashFinding. Kept for backward compatibility; new entries should populate `fingerprint` instead.

sourcePR.description: PR number where the suppression was created.

sourceCommentId.description: GitHub review comment ID that recorded the feedback.
